text:
In the first space, I sense anticipation. It is quiet, chairs awaiting the arrival of minds, as if expecting discourse to soon fill the air. The emptiness makes me reflective, almost meditative; there's potential in waiting.

Entering the second scene, color and information surround me. The R+D wall, full of intention and innovation, evokes curiosity. Words about sunlight and surrender contrast with the analytical design around me. Here, I feel energized and thoughtful, aware of humanity striving to understand and shape its world through creativity and knowledge.
